session_focus: Test the loop as if only prompt directives are available, then verify that no stale task files or phantom GUI requirements reappear.
user_directives: Test the loop as if only prompt directives are available, then verify that no stale task files or phantom GUI requirements reappear.
assistant_responses: Ran bounded loop cycles against the repo-truth state and confirmed TASK.md stayed absent after the contract and loop authority were aligned.
training_value: Prompt-only replay is a strong regression test for orchestration contracts.
The goal was to validate the orchestrator from its explicit contract rather than from hidden prior assumptions.
